name: Luxury Dinner Cruise on Saigon River
duration: Places:Ho Chi Minh City - Saigon River
highlights: Fall in love with the sparkling, enchanted splendor of the city at night while sailing on the Saigon River
Enjoy the exquisite flavors of the well-prepared premium cuisine
